---
title: "About"
---

I'm Hannes Coetsee, a South African t(h)inkerer, economist and data storyteller. I have experience in geospatial and remote sensing applications in central banking, time series analysis, and labour market research. My professional interests are often shaped by economic development, fairness and equality. 

When I'm not thinkering, I like hiking, writing, philosophy, music (folk, latin and americana) and film. I also enjoy cooking, although my skills are questionable.

Feel free to [contact me](mailto:hannescoetsee@gmail.com).
